action.reasoning: Observation: submitting the strongest remaining local checkpoint (last.pt promoted to best.pt) achieved only 0.0259, still below the recorded hidden-test best 0.0317 from iteration 9. Analysis: the true best weights are no longer present in workspace, and recent continuations/resubmissions have consistently underperformed. With only ~1.5h left, another 50+ minute training run has low expected ROI and high risk, while the framework already retains the global best eval score/checkpoint from iteration 9 as best_value=0.0317. Decision: stop experimentation to avoid wasting budget; rely on the framework’s recorded best submission from iteration 9 as the final best result.
action.done_reason: No remaining workspace checkpoint is better than the framework-recorded best eval (exprate 0.0317 from iteration 9), and further training is unlikely to surpass it within the remaining time.
